title: Up to 25% off at selected restaurants with ComBank Visa Cards
description: Treat yourself with amazing ComBank Visa Card dining offers every Thursday. Up to 25% discount at selected restaurants. Payments must be fully settled using ComBank Visa Credit or Debit Cards.

title: Up to 15% off at Courtyard by Marriott Colombo
description: 15% off lunch, 10% off high tea (weekends only), 10% off dinner buffet (daily except blackout dates) at Courtyard by Marriott Colombo with ComBank Credit Cards. Blackout date: June 21, 2026. Reservation: 0117734451 / 0742020002.

title: 15% off at Blue Orbit by Citrus
description: 15% off dining at Blue Orbit by Citrus with ComBank Credit Cards. Maximum 4 people per card daily. Reservation: 0765444111 / 0765443333.

title: 20% off at NH Collection Colombo
description: 20% off for Credit Cards (10% for Debit Cards) at NH Collection Colombo venues: AYU, Thai Rasa, Adityaa, and Vistas. Maximum bill Rs. 50,000. Contact: 076 401 4738.

title: 20% off at Galle Face Hotel
description: 20% off food bills at Galle Face Hotel restaurants: Verandah Restaurant (lunch, high tea, dinner buffets), KOTM Restaurant, 1864 Restaurant, Firebeach Restaurant & Bar. Maximum bill Rs. 30,000 per transaction. Contact: 0777 222 135.

title: 20% off at Hilton Colombo Residences
description: 20% off dining at Hilton Colombo Residences: Flow (Level 3 Pool side) and Basico (cakes). Maximum bill Rs. 75,000 per transaction. ComBank Credit Cards only.

title: Up to 25% off at your favourite restaurants
description: Enjoy the art of dining at your favourite restaurant with ComBank Credit and Debit Cards. Up to 25% discount. Full payment must be made using eligible ComBank cards.

title: 15% off at Cinnamon Red Colombo
description: 15% off for Credit Cards (10% for Debit Cards) at Cinnamon Red Colombo: Flavored Restaurant and Cloud Red Lounge Restaurant. Lunch and dinner only. Maximum bill Rs. 50,000. Contact: 071 2145145 / 0701533952.

title: 15% off dining at Jetwing Hotels
description: 15% off dining at Jetwing Hotels: Virticle by Jetwing, Jetwing Sea - Seaside Social, Jetwing Colombo Seven - Ward 7, Jetwing Jaffna - Peninsula, Jetwing Ayurveda Pavilions - Koththamalli Restaurant, Jetwing Lighthouse - Pan Asian at Nihal's. Min bill LKR 5,000, max LKR 50,000.

title: 20% off at DoubleTree by Hilton Weerawila Rajawarna Resort
description: 20% off dining at DoubleTree by Hilton Weerawila Rajawarna Resort: Spoonbill Restaurant (lunch and dinner buffet) and Turnstone Restaurant (a la carte). Maximum bill Rs. 75,000 per transaction.
merchant: DoubleTree by Hilton Weerawila Rajawarna Resort

title: 20% off at Softlogic Restaurants every Friday
description: 20% off for Credit Cards (10% for Debit Cards) at Softlogic Restaurants every Friday: Burger King, Popeyes, Delifrance (min bill Rs. 2,500), Baskin Robbins, Subway (Rajagiriya, HCM, Colombo 03, Colombo 04, Mount Lavinia), and Crystal Jade. Dine-in and takeaway; Crystal Jade also offers delivery.
merchant: Burger King, Popeyes, Delifrance, Baskin Robbins, Subway, Crystal Jade

title: 20% off at Hilton Colombo
description: 20% off dining at Hilton Colombo: Graze Kitchen (lunch and dinner buffet) and Cafe Kai (cakes only). Maximum bill Rs. 75,000. Not valid for delivery. Blackout dates: May 10, May 14-23, June 21 2026. Reservation: 0112 492 492 / 076 818 5133.

title: 20% off at Ramada Colombo
description: 20% off for Credit Cards (10% for Debit Cards) at Ramada: Gardenia Coffee Shop, Alhambra North Indian Cuisine, Oasis Lounge, and Secret Garden. Dine-in only (a la carte, dinner buffet, high tea). Credit card max bill Rs. 50,000; Debit card max Rs. 35,000 (min Rs. 10,000).

title: 15% off at Ceylon Curry Club & Co Pub and Kitchen
description: 15% off for Credit Cards (10% for Debit Cards) at Ceylon Curry Club | & Co Pub and Kitchen. Maximum bill Rs. 25,000 per transaction. Reservation: 011 426 6363.
merchant: Ceylon Curry Club | & Co Pub and Kitchen
